summary: Iteration 17 Pocket Money & Personal Allowance — 21/21 backend pytest pass; frontend overview, deep-link, per-resident tab, Pay weekly allowance, Add transaction modal (all 7 kinds), delete RBAC, and PDF endpoint verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3941 lines — strongly recommend splitting pocket-money endpoints (~3415-3653) into /app/backend/routers/pocket_money.py along with other domain modules; file size far exceeds the 700-line guideline.

pocket_money_pdf.py opening-balance calculation: for savings_in/savings_out the per-tx loop applies the other-account adjustment by `amount` (unsigned) while also subtracting `delta` (signed) on the primary account; this logic is correct today because tx `account` is always 'pocket' for transfers, but if a future tx ever stores `account:'savings'` for a transfer the reverse will double-count. Consider deriving opening balances from the first tx's `balance_after - delta` instead for robustness.

Transaction endpoint stores `acct` doc and updates independently without a transaction/lock — under concurrent writes the `balance_after` snapshot and account total can desync. Recommend using a MongoDB `$inc` update + return-document pattern or a lightweight distributed lock when integrity under concurrency matters.
test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 ; staff@care.local / Staff@123 ; admin@care.local / Admin@123
seed_data_creation: Test transactions prefixed TEST_iter17 were created on Aisha Khan and Jordan Reilly accounts during pytest runs. A few remain on Aisha (adj, wd, dep, sav_in, sav_out, spend, allowance) after the last run; may be cleaned by next reseed or via DELETE by manager. Does not affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration17.py with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env set. Covers overview, per-resident detail, all 7 tx kinds (including savings_in/out math), amount<=0 422/400, manager-only PATCH & DELETE (staff=403), PDF (default/explicit/invalid month). Frontend verified via browser: /pocket-money stat totals £180.90/£292.00/£34.50 (= 10+7.5+5+12) correct; 4 demo residents present; Open button deep-links to /residents/{id}?tab=pocket-money; Pay weekly allowance adds +£10 tx (balance 41.50→51.50); Add transaction modal exposes all 7 kinds; manager shows ~23 delete icons on tx rows; staff session shows NO Adjust weekly amount button AND NO delete icons on rows (RBAC gate OK). Monthly statement endpoint returns valid application/pdf >500 bytes; frontend fetches via blob (no Playwright download event fires which is expected).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All acceptance criteria for iteration 17 met.
